Eden Hazard has played 2 matches for the Belgium national football team according to the available data in Wikidata. Note: This number may not reflect his actual international appearances, as the property might not correctly capture national team matches.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?matchCount WHERE {
  wd:Q214204 wdt:P1350 ?matchCount
}
```
